title: galium sylvestre var. sudeticum
intro: Galium sylvestre var. sudeticum, also known as Wood Betony, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to certain regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Wood Betony is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antispasmodic agent to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. In herbal preparations, Wood Betony is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to wounds and skin irritations due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
